series_metadata.series_title: Critical Infrastructure (CI) Small Unmanned Aircraft System (sUAS) Records
series_metadata.series_description: The purpose of this Record Series is to provide digital media and coordinating paper records to requesting individuals or agencies. Digital media refers to photos and video; paper records include flight logs and Standard Operating Procedures for the Critical Infrastructure’s sUAS program. Some records may fulfill Homeland Security purposes and may be restricted.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: five (5) years ; Electronic: five (5) years
